data.title: Bitcoin Stuck Below $85,000: Bull Run Shakeout Or Bearish Downtrend?
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been trading sideways over the past 30 days, prompting a debate about when the next strong trend will emerge.

data.title: Nissan Taps $1.3B-Backed AI Pioneer Wayve To Supercharge ProPilot System, Ushering A New Era Of Human-Like Driving
Retail Giant Costco Raises Dividend By 12%
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corp. (NASDAQ: COST) has raised its quarterly dividend from $1.16 to $1.30 per share, totaling $5.20 annually. The new dividend is payable on May 16, 2025, to shareholders on record by May 2, 2025.

data.title: State Street Tops EPS, Misses Revenue — CEO Cites Resilience Despite Global Uncertainty
data.description: State Street beats Q1 EPS, misses revenue; CEO highlights resilience amid global uncertainty.

data.title: What's Going On With Avis Budget Group (CAR) Stock?
data.description: Avis Budget stock jumped as Bill Ackman disclosed a large stake in Hertz. Investors may view Avis as a strong, more reliable play on rental car recovery.
